sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחק

Transliteration: shâchaq

Phonetic: shaw-khak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to rub away, beat fine, pulverise
    1. (Qal)
      1. to rub away
        1. of incense, stones
        2. of enemies (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2367

Part(s) of speech: Verb
